mapper.select: SELECT fr.id, fr.from_user_id, fr.remark, fr.status, fr.create_time, u.username as from_username, u.nickname as from_nickname, u.avatar as from_avatar, DATE_FORMAT(fr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as create_time_str FROM friend_request fr LEFT JOIN user u ON fr.from_user_id = u.id WHERE fr.to_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fr.create_time DESC

SELECT fr.id, fr.from_user_id, fr.remark, fr.status, fr.create_time, u.username as from_username, u.nickname as from_nickname, u.avatar as from_avatar, DATE_FORMAT(fr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as create_time_str FROM friend_request fr LEFT JOIN user u ON fr.from_user_id = u.id WHERE fr.from_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY fr.create_time DESC

SELECT fr.id, fr.from_user_id, fr.to_user_id,fr.remark, fr.status, fr.create_time, u.username as from_username, u.nickname as from_nickname, u.avatar as from_avatar, DATE_FORMAT(fr.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as create_time_str FROM friend_request fr LEFT JOIN user u ON fr.from_user_id = u.id WHERE fr.id = #{requestId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_request SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{requestId}
